item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Due Process Protections in Firearm Removal Orders
item.description:
👀 I’m Just a Bill — Due Process in Firearm Removal Orders

A Liana Banyan “I’m Just a Bill” Bounty Poster

What is this bill?

Federal due-process protections for individuals subject to extreme-risk protection orders (ERPOs) in the 119th Congress.

What does it actually do?

  • Hearing-rights standards
  • Counsel-availability provisions
  • Return-of-firearms timeline standards
  • Appellate process clarity

How does this affect cooperative-class families?

Council provides plain-language explanation only; cooperative does not endorse positions on firearms policy. Composes with Bipartisan Background Checks and survivor-class infrastructure.
